product.title: LuxDermis Renewal Serum
product.body_html:
Most Vitamin C serums oxidize before they reach your skin. LuxDermis uses a stabilized ascorbic acid derivative that stays active and absorbs into the dermis. Clinical result: 94% of participants saw a measurable reduction in fine lines in 8 weeks.

23% Vitamin C complex. Triple-weight hyaluronic acid. Fragrance-free, dermatologist co-developed, Leaping Bunny certified. Airless pump — 18-month shelf life.

metafields.value: LuxDermis Renewal Serum — Clinical Vitamin C for Visible Results
